title: Bregenz, Vorarlberg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Bregenz is a city in Vorarlberg with a population of 29,806. The charming capital of Vorarlberg on the shores of Lake Constance, famous for its floating stage opera festival and stunning Alpine backdrop.
